title: WASPS!
description:
These bees are WAY too innocent to be living in this intesnse game!
Let's welcome our biggest enemies...
body:
![WASPS!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5061d4e43725008b09fc14fba617bb76ccc9fa95.png)

## **Pack Changes:**

- Bees
- Bee Nests
- Beehives
- Honey Bottles
- Honeycombs (Item & Block)
- Honey Blocks
 
## **RESOURCE PACK WORKS BY USING:**

- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) if you want to use it for 1.21, but if you don't want to download any mods, use ⤵
- Optifine 1.20.4 cuz it's not out for 1.21 but I promise you, i will update the pack when Optifine 1.21 is out. 🙏
